description.value:
Prerequisite: Str 15 or Con 15. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Ogre tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Ogre, you gain +2 bonus to Fortitude saves (morale).
description.summary: Summon Ogre tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Ogres; +2 bonus to Fortitude saves (morale) within 50 ft of summon.
